headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -68.3)
key_insights: Fears trending up 211% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 129 quotes and 92 at strong intensity - people are expressing anger and annoyance very forcefully today.

• The frustration score of 58.9 sits in the middle range for this period, showing typical elevated complaint levels.

• Fears jumped dramatically from yesterday's low of -26.5 to 12.2, with 31 strong-intensity quotes driving the surge.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
